seo_title: GLP-1 Exercise Protocol: 7 Steps to Preserve Muscle for Women Over 40
meta_description: On semaglutide or tirzepatide and worried about muscle loss? This 7-step exercise and nutrition protocol helps women over 40 preserve lean mass while losing weight on GLP-1 medications.
